heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 200311 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)20031136:542., .Aug. 20, 1954, ch. 774, § 1268 Stat. 751
